positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of a whimsical woodland scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, mystical forest creatures (like glowing fox and whimsical deer), and floating geometric elements. The composition is centrally balanced, designed as a strong repeat pattern or large graphic print. Style should be neo-art nouveau and detailed vector illustration, using deep indigo, emerald green, warm gold, and sapphire blue color palette. Emphasis on clean outlines, high contrast, and magical glowing effects (bokeh/bloom). Studio lighting, perfectly rendered for textile printing, no photographic elements. High resolution, clean lines.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, signature, cropped, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noise, bokeh, photographic, logo, trademark, text, words, characters
